title: National Geographic Build Your Own Blast Off Rocket Educational Kit Age 5+, 16 cm x 25.8 cm x 6 cm
features: EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Blast off into the exciting world of rocket science with this engaging National Geographic build-your-own rocket launcher kit! This National Geographic STEAM-supported science toy combines learning and play, teaching children about rockets and space exploration through hands-on building
INTERACTIVE DESIGN: Build-and-play 3D puzzle rocket launcher featuring beautifully styled components made from card and mixed materials
LEARNING CONTENT: Includes fascinating rocket facts and detailed instructions that help children understand the mechanics of rocket launches
COMPREHENSIVE KIT: Set includes materials for 4 different rockets and an engaging read-along adventure to enhance the building experience
AGE SUITABILITY: Perfect for children aged 5 years and above, helping develop creativity, imagination, and construction skills whilst learning about science
description: From the manufacturer Build Your Own: Vacuum Cleaner Time for some spring cleaning! Discover the fascinating world of vacuum cleaners with this National Geographic How Things Work build-and-learn kit! Perfect for curious minds aged 5 and up, this STEAM education set lets children construct their own working vacuum cleaner whilst learning about the science behind it. Explore the full range... Build Your Own: Aeroplane Launcher Discover the fascinating world of aeronautics with this National Geographic Aeroplane Launcher kit. The set includes 4 foam planes and a launcher mechanism that children can assemble themselves, teaching valuable engineering concepts through interactive play. Build Your Own: Blast Off Rocket 5, 4, 3, 2, 1 Blast off into the exciting world of rocket science with this engaging National Geographic build-your-own rocket launcher kit! Perfect for young minds aged 5 and above, this STEAM education toy combines hands-on building with fascinating space exploration learning. Build Your Own: Hydraulic Lift Discover the fascinating world of hydraulics with this National Geographic STEAM education kit. The kit features a beautifully designed 3D puzzle that combines cardboard and other materials to create a working hydraulic lift mechanism. Build Your Own: Kaleidoscope Embark on a fascinating journey into the world of light and colour with this National Geographic Kaleidoscope building kit. Once assembled, children can explore mesmerising symmetrical patterns created by colourful beads through the kaleidoscope's lens. Build Your Own: Monocular Embark on an exciting scientific adventure with this build-your-own monocular kit from National Geographic's How Things Work range. The beautifully designed 3D puzzle features card and various materials that come together to create a functional monocular with impressive 3X magnification. Build Your Own: Parachute Launcher Discover the fascinating world of aerodynamics with this National Geographic Parachute Launcher construction set. Part of the innovative How Things Work range, this STEAM education toy combines learning with hands-on fun for children aged 5 and above. Build Your Own: Periscope Dive into the fascinating world of optical science with this build-your-own periscope kit from National Geographic's How Things Work collection. Part of the STEAM education series, this engaging project allows children aged 5 and up to construct their own functioning periscope that extends up to 29 cm. Build Your Own: Racing Car The kit features a beautifully designed 3D puzzle that uses card and various materials to create a striking racing car model. Once assembled, children can explore the principles of force and motion as the car propels forward through air rotation.
